posts.author: richjim (Richard)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello,

We are trying to setup a training checklist board for each team member. We would like to create a template board that has the checklist. We want to create a pulse on the template board it then have automation create the pulse to multiple boards. The reason for this is if we add pulses to the template we don’t want to go to each team members board and have to add it there.

An option we were thinking is creating an automation on the team member’s board “When an item from another board then create the item in this board” but it does not look like this is possible.

Any help would be greatly appreciated!
